message:
feat(fsfs): expand runtime with streaming protocol, config system, and catalog management

FSFS (Fast Search) runtime expansion:

- runtime.rs (+739 lines): substantial expansion implementing the full
  search runtime lifecycle including segment management, query
  dispatch, and graceful shutdown with health monitoring
- stream_protocol.rs (+451 lines): new streaming protocol module for
  incremental result delivery, enabling real-time search result
  streaming with backpressure and cancellation support
- catalog.rs (+138 lines): catalog management refinements for segment
  metadata tracking and lifecycle operations
- config.rs (+53 lines): new configuration module for FSFS runtime
  parameters with validation and defaults
- query_execution.rs: adjustments to query execution pipeline for
  streaming result delivery
- cli_e2e.rs: CLI E2E test infrastructure updates
- lib.rs: module wiring for new components
- tests/cli_command_tests.rs: test updates for new runtime behavior

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -265,10 +265,9 @@ pub fn default_cli_e2e_scenarios() -> Vec<CliE2eScenario> {
             kind: CliE2eScenarioKind::Explain,
             args: vec![
                 "explain".to_owned(),
+                "R0".to_owned(),
                 "--format".to_owned(),
                 "toon".to_owned(),
-                "--query".to_owned(),
-                "embedding budget".to_owned(),
             ],
             expected_exit_code: 0,
             expected_reason_code: CLI_E2E_REASON_SCENARIO_PASS.to_owned(),
